_README: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for the export-control blocked-jurisdiction list (CZID-322). The authoritative, versioned list is owned by the compliance office / counsel — engineering only wires it. This ONE file is consumed by BOTH enforcement layers: the Layer-1 WAF geo rule (Terraform, via jsondecode(file(...))) and the Layer-2 edge Lambda (bundled by build.sh and read at load). 'blocked_country_codes' is the enforced authority; 'rationale' annotates it; 'staged_for_counsel' are candidates NOT yet enforced. Change the enforced set HERE only, then re-plan + rebuild the Lambda + re-run the CZID-333 harness. Governance: EXPORT-CONTROL-LIST-GOVERNANCE.md. Validate before commit: tools/validate-blocked-jurisdictions.py. The legal 'basis' notes reflect the design-doc baseline and are PENDING counsel confirmation, not legal determinations by engineering.

UA.note: WAF geo-match is country-granular, so this blocks ALL of Ukraine; region precision is handled by Layer 2 (CZID-327). Counsel must confirm the whole-country over-block (design doc §10 item 4).

RU.note: Added per Tom's directive 2026-06-25; PENDING counsel ratification. All-Russia over-block carries business impact.

BY.note: Belarus — candidate; awaiting counsel decision. NOT enforced.

VE.note: Venezuela — candidate; awaiting counsel decision. NOT enforced.

MM.note: Myanmar/Burma — candidate; awaiting counsel decision. NOT enforced.
